Quick Links & Portals
Access team tools, ticketing portals, sales forms, and internal network resources.
💼
CRM & Ticketing
CRM 365 Dynamics
The CRM used by the team for raising tickets related to call cases, handling support emails, and managing board calls.
🔑 Credentials Required
Open CRM Portal ↗
📥
CRM & Ticketing
Vision Helpdesk
The helpdesk portal where support emails are received. Used to view, track, update, and resolve customer incidents.
🔑 Credentials Required
Open Helpdesk ↗
💬
CRM & Ticketing
Live Chat
The customer chat support platform embedded on the website for real-time customer conversations and instant support.
🔑 Credentials Required
Open Live Chat ↗
📞
Communications
X-Lite Softphone
VoIP-based softphone software used by the support team to handle inbound and outbound customer calls directly on their computers.
Download / Info ↗
🔑
Tools
Serial Key Portal
Used to view and verify customer serial key details, activation status, and licensing information.
🌐 VPN / Internal Network Only
Open Key Portal ↗
📋
Sales Forms
Consumer Sales Form
Submit this form when a partner, dealer, reseller, or business contact expresses interest in purchasing K7 products for resale or requesting GEM authorization.
Open Google Form ↗
🏢
Sales Forms
Enterprise Sales Form
Submit this form for large-scale enterprise enquiries, business deployment, corporate licensing, or organization purchases.
Open Google Form ↗
🔕
Sales Forms
Renewal Email Notification Stop Form
This form is used to stop renewal reminder emails being sent to customers. Submit this when a customer requests to unsubscribe from renewal notifications.
Open Google Form ↗
🚫
Sales Forms
Pop-up Stopping Form
Used to stop renewal pop-up notifications for customers not satisfied with the alerts. Ensure a screenshot of the pop-up is collected from the customer before submitting for verification.
Open Google Form ↗
🎧
Communications
Tavetal Call Portal
Internal call handling portal used to manage and attend customer calls, inbound/outbound dialers, and queue statuses.
🌐 Internal IP Only 🔑 Credentials Required
Open Call Portal ↗
✉️
Tools
SendGrid Portal
Monitor email delivery status. Verify if customer emails were successfully delivered, marked as spam, or bounced.
🔑 Credentials Required
Open SendGrid ↗
📊
Sales Forms
Key Reset Report
Google Sheet used to record all product key reset requests processed by the support team. Documenting every key reset is mandatory.
Open Google Sheet ↗
🦠
Tools
Virus Bank Portal
Check the analysis progress and detection updates for submitted malware samples. Used primarily by L2 engineers.
🌐 VPN / Internal Network Only 🛠️ L2 Engineers Only
Open Virus Bank ↗
👤
Tools
GreyHR Portal
Employee portal used for managing HR-related activities such as payslips, leave applications, attendance regularization, and employee profiles.
🔑 Credentials Required
Open GreyHR ↗
📱
Communications
SMS Portal
Used to send manual SMS communications to customers for critical alerts. Must obtain prior approval from the reporting manager.
🌐 Internal IP Only ⚠️ Manager Approval Required
Open SMS Portal ↗

Type above and press Enter to add

    🎙️ Voice Hub

    Walkie-talkie calls & group voice rooms

    My Walkie Talkie OFF
    ⚠️ Database setup required
    Run this SQL in your Supabase SQL editor to enable calling:
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS voice_signals (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, from_id text, from_name text,
  to_id text, to_room text, type text, payload text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS voice_wt_status (
  user_id text PRIMARY KEY, user_name text,
  wt_on boolean DEFAULT false, updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS voice_rooms (
  id bigserial PRIMARY KEY, name text, created_by text,
  members text DEFAULT '[]', created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
